description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/open-source-devex/containers/build-terraform:latest Docker image. Define global variables CONTAINER_NAME, CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE and CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. Define two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs ci/build.sh and is excluded for tag pipelines. In the release stage add a release job that runs only on the master branch, sets the GIT_REMOTE variable, executes before_script steps /opt/toolbox/users/setup-bot.sh and /opt/toolbox/users/install-ssh-key.sh "${DEVEX_BOT_SSH_KEY}", then runs ci/release.sh, and runs after_script /opt/toolbox/users/cleanup-bot.sh.
